strings.game.sample_basic_trio.name: Basic Trio
strings.card.ember_lance.name: Ember Lance
strings.card.ember_lance.description: Deal 6 damage to an enemy hero or minion.
strings.card.study_scroll.name: Study Scroll
strings.card.mirror_guard.name: Mirror Guard
strings.card.mirror_guard.description: Summon two 0/2 Mirror Guards with Taunt.
strings.card.frost_pin.name: Frost Pin
strings.card.frost_pin.description: Deal 3 damage to an enemy character and Freeze it.
strings.card.null_form.name: Null Form
strings.card.null_form.description: Transform an enemy minion into a 1/1 Training Spark.
strings.card.ember_wave.name: Ember Wave
strings.card.ember_wave.description: Deal 1 damage to all enemy minions.
strings.card.cinder_sparks.name: Cinder Sparks
strings.card.cinder_sparks.description: Deal 1 damage three times to random enemies.
strings.card.winter_stasis.name: Winter Stasis
strings.card.ember_column.name: Ember Column
strings.card.ember_column.description: Deal 4 damage to all enemy minions.
strings.card.glacier_warden.name: Glacier Warden
strings.card.glacier_warden.description: A 3/6 minion. Its attack freezes damaged characters.
strings.card.spark_adept.name: Spark Adept
strings.card.guard_stance.name: Guard Stance
strings.card.ring_sweep.name: Ring Sweep
strings.card.split_strike.name: Split Strike
strings.card.split_strike.description: Deal 2 damage to two random enemy minions.
strings.card.forge_axe.name: Forge Axe
strings.card.battle_rush.name: Battle Rush
strings.card.battle_rush.description: Give a friendly minion +2 Attack and ready it.
strings.card.battle_focus.name: Battle Focus
strings.card.battle_focus.description: Give your hero +4 Attack this turn.
strings.card.heavy_reaper.name: Heavy Reaper
strings.card.storm_runner.name: Storm Runner
strings.card.war_drummer.name: War Drummer
strings.card.war_drummer.description: After you play a minion with 3 or less Attack, ready it.
strings.card.banner_captain.name: Banner Captain
strings.card.dawn_smite.name: Dawn Smite
strings.card.dawn_smite.description: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
strings.card.mind_spark.name: Mind Spark
strings.card.mind_spark.description: Deal 5 damage to the enemy hero.
strings.card.quiet_verdict.name: Quiet Verdict
strings.card.quiet_verdict.description: Destroy an enemy minion with 3 or less Attack.
strings.card.final_verdict.name: Final Verdict
strings.card.final_verdict.description: Destroy an enemy minion with 5 or more Attack.
strings.card.borrowed_command.name: Borrowed Command
strings.card.borrowed_command.description: Take control of an enemy minion. It enters exhausted.
strings.card.river_guard.name: River Guard
strings.card.needle_scout.name: Needle Scout
strings.card.needle_scout.description: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to an enemy minion.
strings.card.mirror_guard_token.name: Mirror Guard
strings.card.training_spark.name: Training Spark
strings.card.arena_ogre.name: Arena Ogre
strings.card.battle_edict.name: Battle Edict
strings.card.dawn_cleric.name: Dawn Cleric
strings.card.dawn_cleric.description: Whenever a minion is healed, draw a card.
strings.card.aegis_word.name: Aegis Word
strings.card.aegis_word.description: Give a minion +2 Health. Draw a card.
strings.card.spirit_echo.name: Spirit Echo
strings.card.holy_bloom.name: Holy Bloom
strings.card.holy_bloom.description: Deal 2 damage to all enemies. Restore 2 health to friendly characters.
strings.card.mind_glimpse.name: Mind Glimpse
strings.card.mind_glimpse.description: Copy a random card from the enemy hand into your hand.
